title: ‘Mind-blowing’ 20-million-year-old whale fossil discovered on Australian beach
description: The remnants of the ancient vertebrae -- believed to be one of the largest whale fossils ever found in Australia -- was recovered from under about 1.5 feet of sand on Thursday.

title: ASI approves excavation at ancient Balirajgarh fort in Madhubani
description: ASI approves excavation at ancient Balirajgarh fort in Madhubani

title: The Surprising Secret Behind an Ancient Andean Kingdom’s Rise
description: Seabird guano fertilization boosted maize production in ancient Peru, fueling Chincha wealth, trade networks, and strategic Inca alliances. New archaeological findings show that seabird guano—nutrient-rich bird droppings—was not simply a farming aid but a foundation of economic and political power in ancient Peru. By dramatically improving corn yields, it may have played a central role [...]

title: Drug-resistant strain of deadly 'ancient fever' that covers body in painful rash spreading to US
description: A deadly illness once thought to be left behind in ancient history is making a comeback as it mutates to become more resistant to even the most powerful modern-day drugs.

title: Pokémon Fossil Museum coming to Chicago this spring. How to buy tickets
description: Celebrate 30 years with Pokémon by checking out the Field Museum's upcoming interactive exhibit. Find out what's in store and how to buy tickets.
